interpretation_hint.canonical_identifier: Use the `path` field as the canonical concept identifier when discussing the TUI.
interpretation_hint.code_refs: Use `code_refs` as the primary implementation anchors in the codebase.
interpretation_hint.related_paths: Use `related_paths` to pull in nearby concepts that affect behavior.
interpretation_hint.path_resolution: When a concept path is referenced, load that concept, its parents, and its immediate children for context.

root.title: Book Ops TUI
root.summary: Terminal application for browsing works, selecting book operations, annotating merge ranges, and curating character entities.
root.why_it_exists: Provides an interactive front end for parser output review and manual annotation tasks that would be cumbersome in raw JSON or parquet files.

layout.title: Overall Layout
layout.summary: Persistent three-region layout with a left sidebar, right main pane, bottom status bar, and footer.

sidebar.title: Sidebar
sidebar.summary: Left column containing the scrollable list pane and the compact detail panel.

list_pane.title: List Pane
list_pane.summary: Scrollable pane at the top left that holds the main selectable list for the current view.

detail_panel.title: Detail Panel
detail_panel.summary: Fixed-height panel under the list that summarizes metadata for the highlighted item.

views.title: Views
views.summary: The main user-visible modes of the application.

merge_view.title: Merge View
merge_view.summary: Review interface for top-level text segments and manual block-range merge annotations.

pending_selection.title: Pending Selection
pending_selection.summary: The merge range implied by the current cursor and visual anchor that would be toggled by pressing space.

characters_view.title: Characters View
characters_view.summary: Entity curation view for marking characters and merging aliases among person-like entities.

llm_usage.title: LLM Usage Convention
llm_usage.summary: How to refer to these concepts when discussing the TUI with an LLM or OpenCode.

path_reference.title: Path Reference
path_reference.summary: Refer to a concept by its dot path under `root`, for example `root.views.merge_view.pending_selection`.
